name: mhc-h
description: MHC-H — Meaningful Human Control harness per lavoro intellettuale assistito da AI. Sessioni governate, audit trail append-only, dialectical reasoning, provenance-tracked output. Domain-agnostic: applicabile a lavoro legale, ricerca accademica, medical peer review, policy making, engineering ADR, journalism, compliance. MVP 4 skill: mhc-start, mhc-trace, mhc-decision, mhc-end. Backend HTTP REST su api.mhc.regia.it (Bearer auth). AGPL-3.0.
